title: austrobassia parviflora
intro: Austrobassia parviflora, also known as the sandpaper fig or sandpapertree, is a type of plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Austrobassia parviflora include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Austrobassia parviflora can be made into teas, tinctures, and creams for topical application, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
